meaning: n.典型性 代表性 特征
examples: Hu and Zhou walked on the two different ways of typicality.
The typicality of naturalism not only reflects in the theory of naturalism, but also in the literary work.
Ningbo dialect is a relatively typical dialect in northern Wu-Chinese, for its phonetic type of its person pronouns is of certain typicality in Wu-Chinese.
Many conditions that we measure either directly with lab tests or behaviorally can lie under a mask of apparent normalcy or typicality.
